mapper.select: /* TodoRepository.findById */ SELECT todo_id, user_id, todo_title, finished, created_at FROM todo WHERE todo_id = #{todoId}

/* TodoRepository.findAllByUserId */ SELECT todo_id, user_id, todo_title, finished, created_at FROM todo
user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: /* TodoRepository.create */ INSERT INTO todo ( todo_id, user_id, todo_title, finished, created_at ) VALUES ( #{todoId}, #{userId}, #{todoTitle}, #{finished}, #{createdAt} )
